presets_info: Presets save instantly. Random lets you pick time.
microphone_permission_required_message: We need microphone permission to record audio. Please grant permission from settings.
microphone_permission_required: Microphone permission required. Please grant permission.
audio_recording_failed: Audio recording could not be started. Please try again.
speech_recognition_not_available: Speech recognition is not available. May not work on emulator. Try on a real device.
speech_recognition_permission_required_m: We need speech recognition permission to convert your speech to text. Please grant permission from settings.
speech_recognition_permission_required: Speech recognition permission required. Please grant permission.
speech_recognition_failed_to_start: Speech recognition failed to start. Please try again.
speech_recognition_stopped: Speech recognition stopped. Check your microphone and internet connection.
speech_recognition_failed: Speech recognition could not be started: {error}
no_speech_detected:
No speech detected.

⚠️ If using emulator:
• Speech-to-text may not work on emulator
• Test on a real Android/iOS device

Other cases:
• Make sure your microphone is working
• Speak loudly and clearly
• Check your internet connection
• Check if Google Speech Services is installed
audio_file_save_failed: Audio file could not be saved
delete_reminder_content: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder?
audio_playback_failed: Audio could not be played. Check file path or volume.
audio_file_playback_failed: Audio file could not be played: {error}
